overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a covered futuristic urban street in Night City during golden hour. The scene features distinctive wooden beam skylights with pink neon lighting, moderate pedestrian activity, and a brief vehicle interaction at a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway, following a pedestrian in a blue shirt ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt and black vest walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: wooden beam skylight structure with pink neon strip lights running along the beams
orange safety barriers separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle lane
modern glass facade building with vertical wooden slats and illuminated windows
illuminated vertical poster display showing cyberpunk-themed advertisement
multi-level concrete parking structure with visible parked vehicles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban walkway with a distinctive wooden beam roof structure featuring pink neon lighting. The ego character walks forward following another pedestrian, with modern glass buildings on the right and a concrete parking structure visible on the left across the vehicle barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching intersection with directional signage

events.description: ego overtakes the pedestrian in the blue shirt and continues forward

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the walkway, passing other pedestrians and approaching a group ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking in the same direction, overtaken by ego

entered.detail: overhead directional signs indicating Watson and Ferrier districts with arrows
illuminated advertising poster with purple and green neon colors

segments.scene_description: The ego continues through the covered walkway, passing directional signage for Watson and Ferrier districts overhead. The crowd density increases slightly as the character approaches an intersection area, with various digital advertisements visible on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection with vehicle crosswalk and yellow safety stripes

events.description: police car drives past the crosswalk from right to left, followed by other traffic

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles pass through the intersection

notable_agents.action: police car driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the ground
large red industrial-style building with metal roll-up doors and red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The ego reaches a covered intersection marked with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. A police car passes through the intersection from right to left as the character crosses the vehicle lane. The environment features a distinctive red industrial building on the right side of the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway continuing past the intersection

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the wooden beam roof structure and skylights above

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway while the camera angle shifts to look up at the architecture

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the ego continues along the covered walkway. The camera tilts upward toward the end of the clip, showcasing the intricate wooden beam roof structure with skylights and neon lighting against the golden hour sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a covered futuristic urban walkway that transitions from a narrow pedestrian path into a wide, bustling intersection. It begins beneath a distinctive wooden beam roof illuminated by pink neon, following a pedestrian past modern glass buildings and a concrete parking structure. As the character advances, the scene opens up under overhead district signage for Watson and Ferrier, with the crowd density increasing amidst glowing digital advertisements. The camera then glides across a yellow-striped crosswalk as a police car passes by a red industrial building, before continuing along the walkway. Finally, the perspective tilts upward to reveal the intricate geometry of the skylights and neon beams set against the warm glow of a golden hour sky.
